issues.description: Condition 'HasRestingDon' checks for resting DON!! cards. Card text says 'If you have 8 or more DON!! cards on your field' which means attached DON!! (not resting). Should be 'HasAttachedDon' with count:8
Target should include 'maxCount':1 to reflect 'up to 1' limitation. Current target only specifies maxCost but not maxCount
